revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Tsukudaniimasuhitokotoneko-jinja]][[ja:調田坐一事尼古神社]] {{Expand Japanese|調田坐一事尼古神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hikida Shrine | native_name = 調田坐一事尼古神社 | image = Tsukudaniimasuhitokotoneko-jinja.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hikida Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.503015|135.724154}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''hikida Shrine'''|調田坐一事尼古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|lt=Shikinai Taisha|en|Shikinai Taisha|ja|式内大社|simple|Shikinai Taisha|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|lt=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|qid=Q135009132|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings}} * {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}} * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11433427|ltq=Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} ** Series ordinal: 68 ** P155: {{ill|Iwazononiimasu Takumushitama Shrine|lt=Iwazononiimasu Takumushitama Shrine|ja|石園座多久虫玉神社|qid=Q11585337|1=Iwazononiimasu Takumushitama Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135038954|ltq=Q135038954|qid=Q135038954|1=Kanamurano Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q659672|ltq=Q659672|qid=Q659672|1=Katsuragi, Nara}} * {{ill|Yamato Province|lt=Yamato Province|be|Ямата (правінцыя)|ca|Província de Yamato|ckb|پارێزگای یەماتۆ|cs|Provincie Jamato|de|Provinz Yamato|el|Επαρχία Γιαμάτο|en|Yamato Province|es|Provincia de Yamato|fa|ولایت یاماتو|fi|Yamaton provinssi|fr|Province de Yamato|gl|Provincia de Yamato|hak|Yamato-koet|id|Provinsi Yamato|it|Yamato (provincia)|ja|大和国|ko|야마토국|lt|Jamato žemė|nl|Yamato (provincie)|no|Yamato (provins)|pt|Província de Yamato|ro|Provincia Yamato|ru|Ямато (провинция)|simple|Yamato Province|sk|Jamato (provincia)|sr|Провинција Јамато|th|แคว้นยามาโตะ|tr|Yamato (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Ямато|ur|یاماتو صوبہ|zh_min_nan|Yamato-kok|zh_yue|大和國|zh|大和國|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}} * {{ill|Q11620862|ltq=Q11620862|qid=Q11620862|1=Katsuge district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.503015|135.724154}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == image (P18) == * Tsukudaniimasuhitokotoneko-jinja.jpg == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Q135037878|ltq=Q135037878|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20041123081030/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22829 == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 180727 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * くだにますひとことねこじんじゃ * ツキタノ- == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 5150005006072 == Commons category (P373) == * Tsukudaniimasuhitokotoneko-jinja == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県葛城市疋田402', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Tsukudaniimasuhitokotoneko-jinja}} [[JA:調田坐一事尼古神社]] {{wikidata link|Q22119431}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記| date = 2023-12}} {{神社 |名称 = Tsukudanimasu Hitokotoneko Shrine |画像 = [[File:Tsukudanimasu Jinja Haiden.jpg|280px]]
Haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Katsuragi|Q659672|qid=Q659672|1=Katsuragi, Nara}} Hikida 402 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|30|10.6|N|135|43|27.1|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Tsukudanimasu Hitokotoneko Shrine}} |祭神 = Hitokotoneko Ōkami
{{ill|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi Ōkami|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha (great)|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = Ichiken-sha {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} copper-sheet roofing |別名 = Hikida Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 8|Q2924|qid=Q2924|1=October 8}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Tsukudanimasu
Hitokotoneko Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Tsukudanimasu Hitokotoneko Shrine''' (つくだにますひとことねこじんじゃ) is a shrine in {{ill|lt=Katsuragi|Q659672|qid=Q659672|1=Katsuragi, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. Also called '''Hikida Shrine''' (ひきだじんじゃ). It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former rank was village shrine. === History === === Outline === The founding period is unknown. In the ''{{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|qid=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}'', a deity thought to be this shrine (“Tsukita-no-Kami”) is recorded as having received two shrine households: one from {{ill|lt=Harima Province|Q1047523|qid=Q1047523|lt=Harimanokuni|1=Harima Province}} in {{ill|lt=770|Q25021|qid=Q25021|1=770}} ({{ill|lt=Jingo-keiun|Q1373049|qid=Q1373049|1=Jingo-keiun}} 4), and one from {{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}} in {{ill|lt=806|Q30021|qid=Q30021|1=806}} ({{ill|lt=Daidō|Q1373191|qid=Q1373191|1=Daidō}} 1). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, it is listed as “Yamato Province, Katsushimo District, Tsukudanimasu Hitokotoneko Shrine, Great, Tsukinami and Niiname,” and ranked as a great shrine. === Court rank === * {{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|qid=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|qid=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|qid=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|qid=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as “Tsukuda Hitokotoneko-no-Kami.” === Enshrined deities === The deities are Hitokotoneko Ōkami and Kotoshironushi Ōkami. Hitokotoneko Ōkami is treated as the same deity as {{ill|lt=Hitokotonushi|Q10864079|qid=Q10864079|1=Hitokotonushi}}, and “Neko” is interpreted as a title for a noble male deity. === Subsidiary shrines === *Toyo'uke Shrine *Kasuga Shrine === Precincts === ファイル:Tsukudanimasu Jinja Torii.jpg|First torii ファイル:Tsukudanimasu Jinja Honden.jpg|Honden ファイル:Tsukudanimasu Jinja Keidai.jpg|Precincts === Access === *10 minutes on foot south from {{ill|lt=Shakudo Station|Q7487088|qid=Q7487088|1=Shakudo Station}} on the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Minami-Osaka Line|1=UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|qid=Q1531085|1=Kintetsu Railway}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} ===External links=== *[http://www1.kcn.ne.jp/~kazushi/ Tsukudanimasu Hitokotoneko Shrine] (official site) {{Commonscat|Tsukudaniimasuhitokotoneko-jinja}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hikida Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hikida Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:葛城市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Katsuragi, Nara]]
